task: Implement the final-form edit plan for Approach B: Explicit Product/Protocol Re-Foundation from workflow wf-lua-vm-explicit-complete. This is not an MVP/milestone scaffold; move directly toward the final architecture. Preserve the final interpreter spine (`vm_resume → vm_loop → dispatch_instruction`), frame-cache reload, explicit `result_base`, PUC-as-oracle-only boundary, and SponJIT disabled. Implement as much of the concrete plan as practical in one worker run: final products/constants (`ResumeState`, final Frame/ProtectedFrame/UserData/Table/GlobalState/native records), bytecode decoder oracle, validator/dispatch alignment, regions_resume, core call/return migration, protocol modules, and corresponding tests. Do not introduce temporary sidecars or comments-only placeholders. Run relevant tests and report changed files, what was completed, failures/blockers, and any deviations from the final-form plan.
